description_long: This is an upright piano with a light wood finish, featuring a full-length keyboard with alternating black and white keys. The front panel is flat and unadorned, with two visible pedals at the base and a subtle, integrated control panel on the left side above the keys. The piano's body is rectangular and robust, with clean, straight edges and a smooth, matte surface. The back panel is plain and matches the wood grain of the rest of the instrument, while the sides reveal the depth and solid construction of the piano. The lid above the keyboard is closed, and there is no visible music stand. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for both indoor and semi-public urban environments.
description: A modern upright piano with a light wood finish, full keyboard, and two pedals, featuring a clean, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, two pedals, and a subtle control panel on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the piano's depth and the closed lid above the keyboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, continuous wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the piano's solid construction and the closed lid above the keys.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard 88-key layout with alternating white and black keys, no missing or non-standard keys.
